records.title: ClosedIntelligence purpose
records.body: ClosedIntelligence is a logic-only multi-agent LLM package that combines ClaudeClaw-style roles with open Knitweb webs, FieldIntelligence fields, and Lens retrieval.

records.title: Knitweb Lens
records.body: A Lens reads open web snapshots and returns deterministic candidate records with provenance-friendly identifiers.

records.title: ClaudeClaw agents
records.body: ClaudeClaw decomposes a question across scout, weaver, skeptic, steward, and speaker roles before emitting an answer packet.

records.title: Chat product competition
records.body: ClosedIntelligence competes with centralized chat products at the orchestration layer by making roles, memory, retrieval, and evidence inspectable.
